title: Martin C. Smith
text: Home * People * Martin C. Smith Martin C. Smith , a British computer scientist, and former research staff at Department of Computer Science, Queen Mary and Westfield College of London . Smith co-authored with Don Beal on various computer chess and computer Shogi related papers, in particular on the topic of Temporal Difference Learning .
